title: 3.1 Verify no capability lost before deleting agents/
description: Diff agents/naba_batch_processor.md and naba_image_assistant.md against the skill set. If batch-processing capability not represented by any skill, fold into a skill before deletion. Record finding. Blocks 3.4.
close_reason: Audit: naba_image_assistant = pure routing + per-command guidance, fully covered by the 9 individual skills' TRIGGER/SKIP descriptions. naba_batch_processor: brand-kit/storyboard already covered; its UNIQUE icon-suite + asset-pipeline batch patterns folded into a new naba-batch skill (10th skill). agents/ now safe to delete in 3.4.

title: 3.2 Author install.py (frontmatter-driven)
description: Adapt beads-skills/install.py: PEP 723 (pyyaml), frontmatter parse, install-set + depends-on-skill closure, depends-on-tool PATH check (warn/--strict), dest resolution (--scope user|project default user x --surface claude|agents default claude, or --target), rsync -a --delete --exclude=.gitignore, protocols/*.md -> rules/ (present-but-unused for naba), --dry-run, --list-groups. --uninstall is NET-NEW design: removes only naba-* dirs, leaves companion rules unless --force. MIT header (James Dixson/Yoshiko Studios LLC 2026).
close_reason: Authored frontmatter-driven install.py (adapted from beads-skills): scope/surface/target resolution, depends-on-skill closure, depends-on-tool PATH check, rsync install, --dry-run/--list-groups/--strict/--force, net-new --uninstall (removes only naba skills; rules kept unless --force), MIT header. Smoke-tested: lists 10 skills in group naba.

title: 3.2 markdown-lint + drift-check
description: Run markdown-lint over new skill .md files and drift-check against the rewritten (re-approved) manifest; resolve findings.

title: 2.4 Rewrite DRIFT-CHECK.md manifest
description: Edge-by-edge: collapse e-index-table to README-subcommand-table contract; DELETE e-depends-on-skill; retarget e-cli-subcommand to commands/*.md; retarget README/installer edges (e-readme-prereqs/usage/desc, e-installer-frontmatter) to single SKILL.md + commands/*.md; add e-skill-spec (SKILL.md <-> IG/skills.md) + node + glob; single-skill nodes + trigger globs; drop manifest to approved:no until operator re-approves.

title: 3.1 Install + dispatch smoke test
description: Install to throwaway --target dir; confirm skills/naba lands with commands/ subdir, router resolves an inline subcommand (/naba generate), AND one composite runs its subagent through an end-to-end naba call that WRITES A FILE (e.g. batch -o loop) so a child-side Write/Glob permission gap surfaces.

title: 2.2 Update README.md Claude Code Skills section
description: Install examples, collapse 10-row table to a subcommand table, rewrite namespacing note for /naba <subcommand>, add breaking-change note that tells existing users to run ./install.sh --uninstall BEFORE updating (post-deletion the installer cannot remove old /naba-* skills).

title: 2.3 Update AGENTS.md Claude Code Skills section
description: skills/naba single dir; /naba <subcommand> invocation.

title: 2.5 Author docs/specifications/IG/skills.md
description: Spec for the Claude-facing skill layer: invocation (/naba <subcommand> <args>), subcommand->CLI-verb map (7 inline + 3 composite), hybrid dispatch model, where shared guidance lives. Follows existing IG/ style. PRD/EDD unchanged.

title: 2.1 Verify install.py single-skill install
description: Confirm install.py installs the single skills/naba correctly (--dry-run, --list-groups, ./install.sh naba). Adjust only if the single-skill case misbehaves.

title: 1.2 Write commands/<sub>.md x10
description: Extract unique per-command content (usage, command-specific flag table, prompt notes, examples) from each old skills/naba-*/SKILL.md into commands/<sub>.md. Mark inline (7) vs composite (3) per the hybrid split. No repetition of shared guidance.

title: 1.3 Write skills/naba/README.md
description: Single README with the subcommand table and install pointer.

title: 1.4 Remove 10 skills/naba-* directories
description: Clean break: delete all 10 skills/naba-* dirs. Depends on content extraction (1.2) so nothing is lost; git history preserves originals.

title: 0.1 Verify dispatch contract spike
description: Confirm: (1) a user-invocable skill receives '<subcommand> <args>' parseably and a markdown router can branch on the first token; (2) the skill can resolve its own deployed base dir to hand a subagent an absolute commands/<sub>.md path; (3) naba story is a single CLI invocation (inline tier); (4) where the composite's Bash/Write/Glob grant must live (parent frontmatter vs subagent). Negative result on (1) = design pivot, surface to operator.

title: 1.1 Write skills/naba/SKILL.md
description: Frontmatter (name: naba, single comprehensive TRIGGER/SKIP preserving every external SKIP boundary e.g. diagram image vs diagram-authoring/mermaid source; allowed-tools union + spawn tool), router/dispatch table, and shared guidance (prompt-engineering, anti-patterns, global flags) authored ONCE. Document subagent context-delivery mechanism chosen in 0.1.

description: Update install.py verification, README, AGENTS, DRIFT-CHECK, and add the IG spec.

title: Epic 3: Validate
description: Install to throwaway target, smoke-test dispatch incl composite file-write, lint + drift-check.

title: Epic 0: Verify the dispatch contract

title: Gate: DRIFT-CHECK manifest approval
description: Condition: operator reviews and approves bootstrapped DRIFT-CHECK.md (sets approved: yes); drift-check is a silent no-op until then. Test: grep -q '^approved: yes' DRIFT-CHECK.md. Blocks: 5.3 (run drift-check). Instructions: present drafted manifest (nodes/edges/trigger globs); on approval set approved: yes.

title: 5.2 Bootstrap DRIFT-CHECK.md manifest
description: Adapt beads-skills manifest. Nodes: each skill SKILL.md/README.md, install.py, README.md, docs/specifications/*. Edges: (a) SKILL.md frontmatter<->per-skill README, (b) depends-on-tool<->documented prereqs, (c) skills/naba-* dirs<->skill list in README/CLAUDE.md, (d) skill/command names<->docs/specifications. Trigger globs: skills/*/SKILL.md, skills/*/README.md, install.py, README.md. Present to operator; set approved: yes only on confirmation (human gate).
close_reason: Bootstrapped DRIFT-CHECK.md (approved: no): 6 nodes (skill-md, frontmatter-contract, skill-readme, installer, project-readme, cli-source), 7 edges incl. naba-specific e-cli-subcommand (skill naba <sub> -> internal/cli/*.go), trigger globs, fixed-authority policy. Awaiting operator approval (capability gate naba-mol-9zz.6).

title: 5.3 Run drift-check; resolve findings
description: Run drift-check over declared edges; resolve every FAIL in-pass, surface INCONCLUSIVE to operator. Re-run until clean.
close_reason: drift-check verification (isolated report-only agent) over all 7 edges: 7/7 PASS, 0 FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE/CONFLICT. Skill set (10), README index (10 rows), CLI cobra commands (7 subs), installer frontmatter discovery, depends-on-skill resolution all consistent. README usage flag-subset note is within the section-present contract (PASS).

title: 4.4 Confirm bd doctor clean / accepted
description: 0 errors; remaining warnings resolved or explicitly accepted. Remote Consistency: No remotes is a PERMANENTLY-ACCEPTED warning (local-only by design). Confirm JSONL/DB round-trip after a test bead create/close.
close_reason: bd doctor: 0 errors. Non-transient warnings: Remote Consistency (ACCEPTED by design — local-only, resolving it would add a Dolt remote violating Decision 4) and Agent Doc Divergence (handled in Epic 5.1). Transient (clear at commit): Dolt Status, Git Working Tree. JSONL/DB round-trip verified (create->export->find->close).

title: 5.1 Reconcile project-root instruction files (ordered)
description: ORDER: (1) bd setup claude && bd setup codex to regenerate/anchor managed BEADS INTEGRATION blocks (fixes Agent Doc Divergence); (2) apply optimal-instructions around the managed block (AGENTS.md primary, CLAUDE.md thin @-include, behavioral rules in rules surface); (3) re-run bd doctor to confirm no re-divergence. Ensure refs reflect naba-* + install.{sh,py} (no plugin).
close_reason: Reconciled project-root docs (ordered per C6): bd setup codex refreshed AGENTS.md managed block; made AGENTS.md the comprehensive primary (merged naba dev guide + agent ops + local-only beads note, fixed stale bd dolt push); CLAUDE.md thinned to @AGENTS.md with bd-doctor-divergence:ok marker. Agent Doc Divergence warning resolved; doctor 0 errors.

close_reason: Confirmed local-only: no Dolt remotes, no remote refs in config.yaml/metadata.json. Recorded intent via bd config set dolt.local-only=true

close_reason: Hygiene resolved: bd hooks install --force (5 hooks updated), DB metadata version updated (bd migrate), added missing .beads/.gitignore + project .gitignore patterns (doctor gitignore warnings cleared), generated .beads/issues.jsonl (28 records, tracked-eligible). Doctor: 73 passed, 0 errors.

close_reason: Configured GitHub upstream via bd config (github.owner=dixson3, github.repo=naba, custom.upstream.enabled=true, custom.upstream.backend=github, dolt.local-only=true). gh auth active; bd github status = Configured.
